featured.headline: FEATURED
featured.title: A beautiful screenshot tool for macOS
featured.subtitle: Lightweight native macOS screenshot application with capture, annotation, and management capabilities. Inspired by CleanShot X, entirely free and open source.

featured.headline: FEATURED
featured.title: A free clipboard manager for macOS
featured.subtitle: A lightweight, native clipboard manager that automatically saves everything you copy and provides instant access to your clipboard history.

featured.headline: FEATURED
featured.title: Real-time system monitoring in your menu bar
featured.subtitle: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app that displays real-time system metrics with beautiful mini graphs. Monitor CPU, memory, GPU, network, and more.

featured.headline: FEATURED
featured.title: Native macOS password manager
featured.subtitle: A native macOS password manager built with SwiftUI, featuring local AES-256-GCM encryption with optional iCloud sync. Touch ID unlock, auto-lock, and smart clipboard.

apps.name: DodoShot
apps.subtitle: A beautiful screenshot tool for macOS
apps.description: Lightweight native macOS screenshot application with capture, annotation, and management capabilities. Inspired by CleanShot X, entirely free and open source.
apps.longDescription: Lightweight native macOS screenshot application with capture, annotation, and management capabilities. Inspired by CleanShot X, entirely free and open source.
features: Annotation tools with shapes and text

apps.name: DodoClip
apps.subtitle: A free clipboard manager for macOS
apps.description: A lightweight, native clipboard manager that automatically saves everything you copy and provides instant access to your clipboard history.
apps.longDescription: A lightweight, native clipboard manager that automatically saves everything you copy and provides instant access to your clipboard history.

apps.name: DodoPulse
apps.subtitle: Real-time system monitoring in your menu bar
apps.description: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app that displays real-time system metrics with beautiful mini graphs. Monitor CPU, memory, GPU, network, and more.
apps.longDescription: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app that displays real-time system metrics with beautiful mini graphs. Monitor CPU, memory, GPU, network, and more.

apps.name: DodoTidy
apps.subtitle: A native macOS system cleaner
apps.description: A native macOS application for system monitoring, disk analysis, and cleanup. Remove caches, logs, and temporary files with multiple safety mechanisms.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS application for system monitoring, disk analysis, and cleanup. Remove caches, logs, and temporary files with multiple safety mechanisms.

apps.name: DodoCount
apps.subtitle: Google Analytics in your menu bar
apps.description: A beautiful macOS menubar app for Google Analytics 4 and Search Console. Quick access to visitor data and search metrics.
apps.longDescription: A beautiful macOS menubar app for Google Analytics 4 and Search Console. Quick access to visitor data and search metrics.

apps.name: DodoNest
apps.subtitle: Organize your menu bar items
apps.description: A native macOS application for organizing and rearranging your menu bar items through drag-and-drop functionality and search.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS application for organizing and rearranging your menu bar items through drag-and-drop functionality and search.

apps.name: DodoPass
apps.subtitle: Native macOS password manager
apps.description: A native macOS password manager built with SwiftUI, featuring local AES-256-GCM encryption with optional iCloud sync. Touch ID unlock, auto-lock, and smart clipboard.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS password manager built with SwiftUI, featuring local AES-256-GCM encryption with optional iCloud sync. Touch ID unlock, auto-lock, and smart clipboard.
